Mechanical Engineer, CAD & SolidWorks Specialist

I design production-ready mechanical systems and SolidWorks assemblies with focus on manufacturability and system-level performance.

Portfolio

Selected mechanical engineering projects including system-level assemblies, structural designs, and manufacturing-ready CAD models.

  • All
  • Independent
  • Client
Independent Work

Mercedes-AMG Formula 1 Car

Dimensionally accurate reconstruction of a Formula-1 car developed as a full SolidWorks vehicle assembly.

Client Work

Beit Hamikdash Scale Model

A detailed scale model of the Beit Hamikdash was built and optimized from complex STL geometry for manufacturable 3D printing.

Independent Work

Fixed-Wing UAV Structural Airframe

Structural UAV airframe designed for lightweight flight performance and modular construction.

Independent Work

Collapsible Metal Ramp

Foldable ramp system was created with technical drawing for structural stability under operational loads.

Independent Work

Industrial Steel Staircase

Industrial staircase was designed using sheet metal and weldment features in SolidWorks for fabrication-ready structural assembly.

Client Work

1979 Ford Pickup

Classic pickup truck geometry reconstructed into a detailed parametric CAD model, optimized for 3D Printing.

Client Work

3D Terrain & Contour Map

Topographic terrain converted into a detailed 3D CAD model using contour elevation data.

Client Work

Formula 1 Inspired Incense Burner

Consumer incense burner concept developed using Formula-1 inspired aerodynamic styling.

View All Projects

About

Mechanical Engineer specializing in production-ready mechanical system design and SolidWorks. Focused on manufacturable designs, structural reasoning, and system-level assemblies.

Professional Profile

Mechanical Engineer & SolidWorks CAD Specialist

I design production-ready mechanical systems where structural reasoning, assembly logic, and manufacturing constraints are integrated directly into the CAD model.

My work focuses on system-level mechanical assemblies such as structural systems, industrial hardware, and detailed mechanical reconstructions.

Experience Freelance Mechanical Design Engineer
Education Mechanical Engineering — RUET
Certification CSWP | 5x CSWPA
Specialization SolidWorks CAD & Mechanical System Design
Capabilities Parametric CAD
Structural Assemblies
Manufacturing Drawings
Primary Tools SolidWorks, Blender, ANSYS Fluent

Services

Mechanical engineering and SolidWorks CAD services focused on production-ready designs, system-level assemblies, and manufacturing documentation.

Mechanical Engineering & CAD Design Services

I develop production-ready mechanical systems and CAD models prepared for engineering workflows and manufacturing. Services include system design, parametric modeling, fabrication documentation, and reverse engineering.

See all services

Mechanical System Design

Design of functional mechanical systems and assemblies with structural reasoning, component interfaces, and manufacturability considerations.

SolidWorks CAD Modeling

Parametric 3D modeling of parts and assemblies prepared for modification, analysis, and engineering workflows.

Engineering Drawings & Fabrication Documentation

Manufacturing-ready technical drawings and documentation for machining, fabrication, or prototyping.

CAD Reconstruction & Reverse Engineering

Accurate CAD model reconstruction from images, reference geometry, or scan data for engineering analysis or manufacturing.

Publications

Publications include a book chapter and conference papers on CFD-based airfoil and wind turbine aerodynamics, focusing on biomimetic design and passive flow control techniques such as tubercles and Gurney flaps.

Book Chapter

Elsevier

2026

Learning from Nature: Biomimetic Solutions for Improved Wind Turbine Performance

Mim Mashrur Ahmed, Hasan Muhommad Robin, Mokarrom Ahamed Badhon, Numan Zaman Dipu, Md Mahbub Alam, Mahadi Hasan Masud

Status: In Production

Conference Paper

ICMERE 2025

2025

Numerical Investigation of Airfoil Performance with Tubercles and Gurney Flaps Using Mesh-Independent CFD Simulations

Numan Zaman Dipu, Mokarrom Ahamed Badhon, Nusrat Nawar Ahsan, Mst. Nusrat Akther, Zannatul Mim

DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19064111

ICERIE 2025

2025

Biomimetics in Wind Turbine Blade Designs: A Review from Aerodynamic Perspective

Numan Zaman Dipu, Mokarrom Ahamed Badhon, Hasan Muhommad Robin, Mim Mashrur Ahmed

DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.17753819

ICMIME 2024

2024

A Systematic Comparison Among Different Passive Flow Control Strategies to Enhance the Aerodynamic Performance of Wind Turbines

Mokarrom Ahamed Badhon, Numan Zaman Dipu, Mim Mashrur Ahmed
